mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.parent_id AS "parent.id", a.parent_ids, a.area, a.code, a.name, a.sort, a.type, a.grade, a.address, a.zip_code, a.master, a.phone, a.fax, a.email, a.remarks, a.create_by_id AS "createBy.id", a.create_time, a.update_by_id AS "updateBy.id", a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.useable AS useable, p.name AS "parent.name" FROM sys_office a LEFT JOIN sys_office p ON p.id = a.parent_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
